results.title: Dual-Head Knowledge Distillation (2024/11)
results.snippet: LLM-side: dual classification heads, auxiliary heads removed at inference.
results.reason: Functional equivalence is strong: explicit auxiliary head used during training and REMOVED (ablated) at inference — directly matches the candidate's scaffold-then-ablate discipline (auxiliary scaffold installed → main learns → auxiliary formally removed). func>=0.7 triggers OR.

results.title: Layered Self-Supervised KD (LSSKD) (2025/6)
results.snippet: LLM-side: stage-wise auxiliary classifiers removed at inference.
results.reason: LSSKD attaches stage-wise auxiliary classifiers across multiple layers and removes ALL of them at inference — operationally equivalent to candidate's multi-stage scaffold-then-ablate. The 'stage-wise' framing aligns with the candidate's 3-stage protocol. func>=0.7 triggers OR.

results.title: Sequential Multi-Stage KD Framework (2026/1)
results.snippet: LLM-side: multi-stage distillation; frozen reference anchors prior-stage knowledge.
results.reason: Sequential multi-stage KD with a frozen reference anchoring prior-stage knowledge matches the candidate's stage-2 mechanic (frozen A_temp+H_aux consulted while A_main learns). Multi-stage structure aligns with 3-stage protocol. func>=0.7 triggers OR.

results.title: IMPROVE: Iterative Pipeline Refinement (2025/2)
results.reason: Iterative refinement, not auxiliary-installation-then-ablation. No formal scaffold removal step. The candidate's novelty_claim explicitly distinguishes from IMPROVE. func<0.7, sem<0.7, kw<2.

results.title: Revision or Re-Solving: Second-Pass Gains (2026/4)
results.reason: Inference-time scaffold-then-refine across multi-LLM pipelines, not training-time auxiliary installation with formal ablation. Candidate explicitly distinguishes inference-time scaffolding from training-with-ablation. func<0.7, sem<0.7, kw<2.

fail_reason: 3 functional hits at func>=0.7: rank 4 (Dual-Head KD, auxiliary-head-removed-at-inference), rank 5 (LSSKD, stage-wise auxiliary classifiers removed), rank 6 (Sequential Multi-Stage KD, multi-stage with frozen reference). The candidate's 3-stage scaffold-then-ablate discipline is functionally captured by existing KD-with-auxiliary-head-removal literature; the 'internalization verification' addendum is a minor probing step on top of established practice, insufficient to constitute a novel mechanism.
